message:
🐛 fix tile button with native button and mount race guards (#60)

- Replace Primer Box as=button with native <button> for reliable onClick
- Add tileModeRef to prevent stale timeout callbacks mounting into wrong container
- Add cleanup to single-mode mount effect to cancel pending timeouts
- Guard tile mount retries with tileModeRef.current check
- Only re-mount terminals in tile when container changed (prevent flicker)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
